## customer-story-adalat-ai-claude.md

# Adalat AI makes India’s court system accessible to millions with Claude


[Try Claude](https://claude.ai)


[Contact sales](/contact-sales)


Industry:

Beneficial deployments

Company size:

Small

Product:

Claude Platform

Partner:

Location:

India

50–200% productivity gains

across engineering teams with Claude Code

National WhatsApp helpline launched,

providing multilingual legal information to a country of 1 billion people

Nonprofits

Turn limited resources into lasting impact. Generate grant proposals, track program outcomes, and free your team to focus on serving your community.

Read more

[Read more](/solutions/nonprofits)

Read more

Nonprofits


Turn limited resources into lasting impact. Generate grant proposals, track program outcomes, and free your team to focus on serving your community.

Video caption


Nonprofits

Turn limited resources into lasting impact. Generate grant proposals, track program outcomes, and free your team to focus on serving your community.

Claude Code

Anthropic's agentic coding tool. Claude Code understands your codebase, edits files, runs commands, and helps you ship faster.

Read more

[Read more](/product/claude-code)

Read more

Claude Code


Anthropic's agentic coding tool. Claude Code understands your codebase, edits files, runs commands, and helps you ship faster.

Video caption


Claude Code

Anthropic's agentic coding tool. Claude Code understands your codebase, edits files, runs commands, and helps you ship faster.

[Prev](#)

Prev


[**Adalat AI**](https://www.adalat.ai/) is a legal-tech nonprofit building justice technology for courts across India and the Global South, supporting judges and court staff with real-time multilingual speech-to-text and  AI-powered translation with Adalat’s models. With Claude, Adalat AI accelerated its engineering capacity and launched India’s first AI-powered national case information helpline on WhatsApp—giving ordinary families the ability to understand their own court cases, in their own language, for the first time.

## With Claude, Adalat AI accomplished:

- 50–200% productivity gains across engineering teams with Claude Code
- Production-ready products deployed to real users in under 30 days, built by a single engineer using Claude Code
- Claude API intelligence layer implemented in 2 days; first working prototype in 1 week
- Bug resolution dropped from half-day investigations to under two hours
- National WhatsApp helpline provides multilingual legal information across the country

## The challenge: A justice system overwhelmed by delay

India has more than 50 million pending court cases. The average case takes more than 12 years to resolve. At the current pace, clearing the backlog could take centuries.

“India’s court backlog isn’t an abstract statistic, it shapes everyday life for millions of families,” said Adalat AI co-founder and CEO Utkarsh Saxena. “With over 50 million pending cases and average resolution times exceeding 12 years, justice often arrives too late to matter.”

The consequences are personal: people awaiting trial spending years in jail without conviction, farmers unable to reclaim seized land, and workers waiting for unpaid wages. With 76% of India’s prison population consisting of people awaiting trial, the burden falls hardest on the poor and marginalized. India has roughly 20 judges per million people, compared to 150–200 in developed countries. “Even saving 30 minutes a day per judge, multiplied across 4,000+ courtrooms, is equivalent to adding hundreds of judges to the system without hiring a single one,” said Saxena.

Beyond the courtrooms, litigants face a deep information access crisis. Most court portals have non-intuitive navigation, multiple CAPTCHAs, and content overwhelmingly in English—effectively unusable for low-income or non-English-speaking communities. Families often have no idea what is happening in their own cases.

## Choosing Claude for privacy standards 

Adalat AI evaluated multiple models before selecting Claude Sonnet 4.5 and Haiku 4.5. “Claude consistently produced summaries that were both faithful to the source and genuinely readable for non-lawyers,” said Arghya Bhattacharya, Co-founder and CTO. “Other models either oversimplified, losing critical nuance, or reproduced the complexity without making it accessible.” Claude’s disciplined reasoning—staying within the document without speculating or providing legal advice—was noticeably stronger than alternatives. 

“In our world, institutional trust compounds slowly and collapses quickly,” Bhattacharya said. “We chose Claude in part because Anthropic’s approach to data handling and privacy aligned with the trust standards we need to maintain with our government and judicial partners.”

## The solution: Claude Code for engineering speed, Claude’s API for accessible justice

Adalat AI turned to Claude on two fronts: Claude Code to accelerate internal engineering, and the Claude API to power a national WhatsApp helpline that puts court case information directly into litigants' hands.

**A national helpline on WhatsApp.** The WhatsApp chatbot, built on the Claude API, is India’s first AI-powered national case information helpline. Anyone in the country can search for their court case, check its status, review case history, see the next hearing date, and download orders—through a platform more than 500 million people in India already use daily.

Claude’s critical role is summarization and translation. Court orders are often lengthy, written in formal English legal jargon, and impenetrable to non-lawyers. A perfectly accurate English summary doesn’t help a Kannada-speaking farmer. Claude summarizes documents into clear, actionable takeaways and translates them into the user’s chosen language—currently English, Hindi, Kannada, and Malayalam.

“When you take a 15-page court order written in English legal jargon, and Claude summarizes it into three clear paragraphs in Kannada or Hindi explaining what was decided, what the litigant needs to do, and when their next hearing is, you’re transforming court records from inaccessible legal artifacts into actionable information,” Saxena said. “For the first time, a litigant can understand their own case without depending entirely on their lawyer or a paid intermediary.”

**Accelerating engineering with Claude Code.** The core engineering team uses Claude Code for architecture validation, feature development, rapid bug resolution, and an additional layer of code review. Adalat’s Zero-to-One Initiatives team—a rapid prototyping arm—staffs each initiative with a single engineer, with Claude Code as their force multiplier. The team runs 3 to 4 parallel initiatives simultaneously, each delivering fully functional products within 30 days. 

“Not mockups or wireframes, actual working products that we put in front of court users to get real feedback,” Bhattacharya said. “This means we skip the intermediate step of showing designs. Our users can play around with a living product and give us concrete, grounded feedback.”

## The results: Faster engineering, accessible justice at national scale

With Claude Code, Adalat AI's engineering teams are seeing between 50 and 200% productivity gains. "For a philanthropy-funded nonprofit, that's an extraordinary multiplier on donor dollars,” Bhattacharya said. 

The rapid prototyping team, which is shipping multiple new product lines simultaneously, is seeing gains of up to 200%, moving at the pace of a team three times its size. The core platform and engineering teams, which maintain and actively develop the product running in 20% of all courts in India every day, are seeing around 50% gains, consistently delivering output equivalent to a team 50% larger.

"Claude Code has been an absolute revolution internally,” says Bhattacharya. “As a nonprofit you're constrained in how many engineers you can hire, and the fact that you can boost productivity per engineer versus hiring more engineers is a huge resource optimization."

Combined with test-driven development practices, the result is a more robust codebase with fewer issues reaching production. Bug resolution dropped from half-day investigations to under two hours. The Claude API integration for the chatbot was implemented in 2 days, with the first working prototype operational within 1 week.

“The biggest implementation challenge wasn’t actually Claude,” Bhattacharya said. “It was the surrounding infrastructure: integrating with India’s fragmented court data systems, handling the WhatsApp Business API, managing multilingual flows, and building the case identification layer that sits upstream of the LLM. Claude was the part that ‘just worked.’”

Early user feedback has been strong. “They’re very surprised that this is accessible on WhatsApp,” said Saxena. “The idea that they can chat on WhatsApp and get the actual document and then also get it translated and summarized has been transformative.”

Looking ahead, Adalat AI plans to expand language support to 10 or more Indian languages and deepen integrations with state court systems. The team is already in conversations about expansion to Ghana, Kenya, and Zambia. “If the chatbot proves itself in India, the model is replicable across the Global South,” Saxena said. “The Anthropic partnership could scale with us into common-law jurisdictions serving over two billion people.”


"For a philanthropy-funded nonprofit, that's an extraordinary multiplier on donor dollars."

Arghya Bhattacharya

Co-founder and CTO


Video caption

## customer-story-advolve-claude.md

# Advolve automates digital marketing with Claude


[Try Claude](https://claude.ai)


[Contact sales](/contact-sales)


Industry:

Professional services

Company size:

Small

Product:

Claude Platform

Partner:

Location:

North America

90% reduction

in operational work time

15% increase

in customer return on ad spend

Read more

[Read more](#)

Read more


Video caption


Read more

[Read more](#)

Read more


Video caption


[Prev](#)

Prev


Advolve, a B2B Service-as-a-Software company, uses Claude as the central orchestrator of their AI platform to automate the entire digital customer acquisition process, enabling companies to achieve human-level performance in managing multi-million dollar advertising budgets.

With Claude, Advolve is able to:

- Reduce operational work time by 90%
- Increase customer return on ad spend (ROAS) by 15%
- Project 10x revenue for 2025
- Manage millions of ads simultaneously

## Building an AI-native approach to digital marketing

Advolve, an AI-native company, approached digital marketing automation differently from the start. João Sobreira, co-founder, said, "Our company is AI-native, so we built our entire system around having a trustworthy AI to handle all of the features we had in mind." Their team recognized that traditional digital marketing workflows—spanning multiple platforms, creative assets, and data streams—demanded a fundamentally new approach.

"We started by generating static creative assets and copywriting, building an end-to-end system of AI agents that generate and evaluate each asset layer—background, art, fonts, copywriting—based on data from successful past ads," said Sobreira. "Then, we expanded to automate the entire cross-platform campaign configuration, deployment, and optimization, using machine learning to allocate budgets dynamically across platforms and adapt content for the best return on ad spend."

## Selecting Claude for enterprise-grade reliability

After evaluating multiple AI models, Advolve chose Claude for its superior capabilities in orchestrating complex systems. "Our main challenge was to create a complex system connecting multiple software, platforms, and data inputs—way beyond human capabilities," said Sobreira. "We needed robust validation mechanisms, reliable code generation support, and the ability to generate effective creative texts for copywriting. Claude consistently outperformed alternatives in our LLM evaluator testing."

The decision centered on Claude's:

- Advanced code generation for complex technical implementations
- Consistent reliability with lower hallucination rates
- Superior performance in technical validation tasks
- Comprehensive documentation and implementation support
- Sophisticated multi-platform workflow orchestration

## How Claude powers intelligent advertising

Claude’s reasoning capabilities help Advolve with:

- End-to-end workflow automation across advertising platforms
- Real-time data validation and process integrity checks
- Dynamic budget allocation and optimization
- Multi-platform content generation and deployment
- Complex decision-making for campaign management

"Since Claude powers our platform’s central reasoning, we can efficiently manage millions of advertisements simultaneously due to its processing speed," said Sobreira. "The integration was straightforward, allowing us to focus immediately on building our specialized workflows and features."

## Transforming results for businesses

Claude's impact has driven exceptional business growth for Advolve. With their AI-native approach, Advolve anticipates scaling significantly in 2025, managing ad budgets exceeding \$100M by year's end.

The system's effectiveness has attracted major enterprise clients. "Our platform achieves human-level ROAS when managing multi-million dollar budgets in under 30 days," said Sobreira. "We're trusted by some of the largest companies in Brazil, such as iFood and Cogna, validating our impact and scalability."

The transformation is even more dramatic for clients. Operations that previously required large teams now run efficiently with lean staffs while maintaining human-level performance.

## Building an AI-powered future for digital marketing

As an AI-native company, Advolve views the future of advertising technology through the lens of deep tech innovation. "We aim to transform the adtech industry by building a deep tech company through AI," said Sobreira. "We're focused on exploring fine-tuning capabilities to combine Anthropic's powerful models with our proprietary solutions."

Their partnership with Anthropic continues to evolve. Sobreira concludes, "We deeply value Anthropic's team—they're highly skilled and a pleasure to work with, making collaboration smooth and productive. Sobreira said, "Looking ahead, we're excited to host joint events in Brazil, bringing together influential companies to showcase our combined strengths.”

## customer-story-aes-claude.md

# AES accelerates renewable energy adoption with Claude on Google Cloud’s Vertex AI


[Try Claude](https://claude.ai)


[Contact sales](/contact-sales)


Industry:

Software

Company size:

Large

Product:

Claude Platform

Partner:

Google

Location:

North America

96% faster

audit results generation

10-20% increase

in audit accuracy

Read more

[Read more](#)

Read more


Video caption


Read more

[Read more](#)

Read more


Video caption


[Prev](#)

Prev


AES, a global energy company, uses Claude on Google Cloud’s Vertex AI to automate safety audits and accelerate their mission of transforming the future of energy. By leveraging Claude's advanced natural language processing capabilities via Vertex AI, AES has:

- Increased audit accuracy by 10-20%
- Generated audit results 96% faster
- Reduced audit costs by 99%

## The challenge of scaling renewable energy asset management

As AES transitioned to renewable energy, their success created a new challenge: how to efficiently manage and maintain a vastly more complex network of power-generating assets. Dr. Sean Otto, Senior Director of Data Science and Analytics at AES, explained the scale of this challenge, saying, "With traditional power plants, you might have one large turbine generating a gigawatt of power. But with wind energy, each turbine only generates 1.5 megawatts, so you need 75 to match that output. Instead of maintaining one piece of equipment, we're now managing 75 separate assets."

This exponential growth in assets required a complete reimagining of AES' safety and maintenance processes. The company conducts about 1,550 internal safety audits annually, typically performed by employees whose primary roles are not auditing. These audits, which could take up to two weeks to complete, were becoming an unsustainable drain on time and resources. AES needed an innovative solution that could dramatically reduce the effort required for audits while maintaining or improving their accuracy.

## Why AES chose Claude on Google Cloud’s Vertex AI

For AES, Claude's capabilities and Vertex AI's robust infrastructure were key to scaling their safety audit solution securely and efficiently. Security was paramount. Running Claude on Vertex AI provided the enterprise-grade security AES needed for their sensitive data. As Dr. Marwan Sherri, Data Scientist at AES, noted, "Integrating Vertex AI with Claude made it easier to get approval to start API calls. Because it's already integrated and all security issues are addressed."

Another critical factor was performance. Sherri highlighted the importance of speed and accuracy, saying, "Claude is accurate and quick. We need this process to be 100 times faster than a human." Claude's ability to follow instructions precisely was essential for AES' multi-agent framework, and its support for higher API call volumes enabled better synchronization of their agent system.

Integration was seamless since AES was already using Vertex AI. As Sherri explained, "We're very familiar with Vertex AI. To launch anything through Vertex AI, we need an API call integration so we can integrate the tool inside Vertex AI with the project-based configuration to solve related issues like permission levels or the service account." This familiarity accelerated development and deployment of their AI-powered safety solution.

## How Claude on Vertex AI powers AES's AI auditor

AES developed an AI-powered auditing system using Claude on Vertex AI to automate their internal safety audit process. The system consists of three layers of AI agents:

1.  Document processing agents that analyze audit documents and create tasks
2.  Task breakdown agents that simplify complex audit tasks
3.  Report generation agents that compile results and produce final audit reports

This multi-agent system powered by Claude on Vertex AI can process hundreds of pages of safety documentation, evaluate compliance, and generate comprehensive audit reports.

By using Vertex AI, AES leverages Google Cloud's infrastructure for seamless deployment and scaling.

## Transforming safety and efficiency

AES improved their safety operations by integrating Claude on Vertex AI into their audit processes. Audit reports that took two weeks to complete can now be generated in about an hour. This 99% reduction in audit time allows AES to conduct more frequent and thorough safety checks across their expanding renewable energy assets.

The increased speed hasn't compromised quality. AES has seen a 10-20% improvement in audit accuracy. Dr. Sherri noted, "These agents can't make mistakes due to their focus on details." This accuracy contributes to AES' core value of safety, ensuring reliable protection for employees and assets.

The cost savings have been equally impressive, with audit expenses reduced by 99%. This reduction allows AES to allocate resources more effectively, potentially enabling greater investment in renewable energy expansion and innovation.

## Looking forward to AI's role in accelerating renewable energy

AES sees generative AI as a transformative force in the energy industry. Otto emphasized, "The power of GenAI is in process improvement." By using Claude to automate complex processes like safety audits, AES can redirect their focus to innovation and expansion in renewable energy.

Dr. Otto envisions AI driving positive change in a traditionally conservative industry, explaining, "AI is important because it's driving innovation and pushing people to question traditional ways of doing things. We're reimagining processes that have been unchanged for decades." With Claude's advanced capabilities on Vertex AI, AES aims to streamline operations, manage more renewable assets efficiently, and ultimately accelerate the world's transition to sustainable energy.

## customer-story-alexa-claude.md

# Claude and Alexa+


[Try Claude](https://claude.ai)


[Contact sales](/contact-sales)


Industry:

Software

Company size:

Large

Product:

Claude Platform

Partner:

Location:

North America

U.S. rollout

starting in the next few weeks, with wider availability coming

Best-in-class

jailbreaking resistance and advanced safety capabilities

Read more

[Read more](#)

Read more


Video caption


Read more

[Read more](#)

Read more


Video caption


[Prev](#)

Prev


Today, we're announcing that Claude models are helping power Alexa+. This collaboration is part of our ongoing partnership with Amazon to deliver advanced AI technology to businesses and consumers around the world.

Teams from Amazon and Anthropic worked closely throughout the past year. Our Chief Product Officer, Mike Krieger, led a team that helped Alexa+ to get the full benefits of Claude's capabilities.

Consistent with Anthropic's commitment to trust and safety, Alexa+ is able to take advantage of our best in class capabilities, such as our advanced jailbreaking resistance.

Alexa+ accesses Claude through Amazon Bedrock. It will start rolling out in the U.S. in the next few weeks, becoming more widely available in the coming months.


Video caption

Prev

## customer-story-amazon-q-claude.md

# Amazon Q in Connect transforms customer service for agents and customers with Claude


[Try Claude](https://claude.ai)


[Contact sales](/contact-sales)


Industry:

Software

Company size:

Large

Product:

Claude Platform

Partner:

AWS

Location:

North America

61 languages

supported without additional training

10-15% time savings

on every customer contact

Read more

[Read more](#)

Read more


Video caption


Read more

[Read more](#)

Read more


Video caption


[Prev](#)

Prev


Amazon Connect uses Claude to power their AI-driven customer service assistant, Amazon Q in Connect, that serves two critical groups: customer service agents who need real-time support to resolve complex issues, and end-customers seeking immediate self-service across voice and digital channels.

With Claude, Amazon Q in Connect:

- Empowers agents with real-time AI assistance to handle complex cases
- Provides end-customers with instant, personalized self-service options
- Supports customer service in 61 languages without additional training
- Helps customers like Orbit achieve 10-15% time savings on every contact

## Meeting the needs of agents and customers

Amazon Q in Connect addresses two fundamental challenges in customer service: how to help agents efficiently handle complex support requests while maintaining quality, and how to give end-customers immediate answers without long wait times. Support teams face mounting pressure, with agents spending significant time searching through documentation and disparate applications while customers wait for answers.

"Amazon Connect has always had self-service solutions. Since day one, we've aimed to integrate AI to improve both the agent and customer experience with faster resolutions, avoiding unnecessary escalations, and resolving issues on the first contact," said Jack Hutton, Principal Product Manager for Amazon Q in Connect. While traditional AI works well for certain scenarios, more complex interactions involving language nuances and ambiguous questions can benefit from more sophisticated AI capabilities, allowing organizations to better support both their agents and customers when needed. The team needed a more sophisticated solution that could both assist agents and directly serve customers.

## How Claude powers personalized support experiences

Amazon Q in Connect leverages Claude to enhance customer service:

For Agents:

- Real-time AI assistance for handling complex customer inquiries
- Automated documentation search and relevant information surfacing
- Suggested responses based on customer context and history
- Recommended actions for the agent to take

For End-Customers:

- Instant, conversational self-service options across multiple channels
- Natural language understanding to disambiguate complex customer issues
- Personalized responses and recommendations based on their history and context
- Seamless handoff to agents when needed

Shared Capabilities:

- Real-time response analysis that automatically identifies customer intent
- Multi-turn disambiguation that clarifies complex needs through dialogue
- Customizable prompt templates for unique voice, policies and workflows

## Transforming experiences for agents and customers

Integrating Claude has improved support operations on both sides. "For one customer pilot, their average handle time actually increased. But this is because agents who normally would just transfer away hard contacts could now solve them," said Jack Hutton, Product Manager at Amazon Q and Connect. The impact extends beyond just handle times—businesses like Orbit have reported 10-15% time savings on every customer contact through AI-assisted support.

For end-customers seeking support, this means faster and more consistent experiences. Instead of waiting 30 minutes for answers, they receive instant, personalized responses based on their full context and history. When they do need to speak with an agent, they connect with someone better equipped to help thanks to AI assistance, avoiding transfers and repeat explanations.

### Building the future of AI-powered customer service

Amazon Q in Connect is transforming customer service by handling routine inquiries while enabling human agents to focus on complex problem-solving and relationship building. "Businesses will use generative AI, Q included, to tackle ambiguous and highly-fluid self-service use cases. This enables human agents to focus on complex issues that require expertise, enhancing customer satisfaction and employee development," said Hutton.

Through this dual focus on empowering agents and serving end-customers directly, Amazon Q in Connect with Claude is transforming how businesses deliver customer service, making it more efficient and effective for everyone involved.


Video caption

## customer-story-amira-learning-claude.md

# Amira helps millions of students master reading with the Science of Reading and Claude


[Try Claude](https://claude.ai)


[Contact sales](/contact-sales)


Industry:

Education

Company size:

Small

Product:

Claude Platform

Partner:

Location:

North America

10 billion words

read aloud and analyzed worldwide

70% faster

reading growth for students

Read more

[Read more](#)

Read more


Video caption


Read more

[Read more](#)

Read more


Video caption


[Prev](#)

Prev


Amira Learning uses Claude to power key new features of their AI reading technology, helping millions of students develop reading comprehension skills and background knowledge through individualized, conversational learning experiences.

With Claude’s assistance, Amira:

- Listens to and understands students with any accent or dialect. Amira has listened to more than 10 billion words read aloud worldwide.
- Decides, in the moment, how to coach a student, providing hundreds of science-based interventions that support reading growth.
- Implements voice-based AI dialogues and comprehension conversations for elementary students

## Advancing Comprehension: A Complex but Critical Step in Reading Development

As Ran Liu, Chief AI Scientist at Amira, explains, “Reading proficiency is a critical challenge in education, with millions of students struggling to develop the comprehension skills essential for academic and life success.”

Amira addressed this challenge by designing an AI-powered reading assessment and personal tutoring technology with advanced children’s speech recognition. While Amira excelled for years at teaching foundational word recognition skills, opportunities remained to enhance instruction and tutoring on comprehension—understanding meaning, making inferences, and connecting ideas—and knowledge building through reading.

"When LLMs emerged, we saw an opportunity to expand our AI capabilities to teach reading comprehension in a dynamic and natural way, just like an expert human tutor would,” said Liu. The challenge was to create AI that could engage students in sophisticated educational conversations about texts while maintaining strict safety standards for young learners. This required intersecting cutting-edge technology with deep pedagogical expertise.

## Why Amira chose Claude

Amira selected Claude after rigorous testing revealed its superior performance for educational applications. "We conducted extensive benchmarking across a variety of commercial and open-source models and found that Claude performed exceptionally well," said Liu. The model consistently earned high scores from human content experts who evaluated the quality and educational value of its generated dialogues, making it the clear choice for Amira.

In Amira's selection process, safety was equally important. Liu noted, "We know Anthropic prioritizes safety and accuracy in their models. Amira operates on private, secure AI systems. The data students generate stays within our secure infrastructure and is not accessible by external AI providers. When a student uses Amira, their data is never shared with or used to train any public AI models or third-party foundation models,” emphasizing how critical this is when developing technology for young students.

Claude's leading language capabilities further distinguished it from competitors. Liu explained, "Claude has consistently performed well with language tasks, making it well-suited for the dialogues that power comprehension tutoring in Amira.”

## How Claude powers Amira's reading comprehension

Amira uses Claude to enhance reading comprehension in several ways:

- **Generating comprehension dialogues**: Claude powers experiences where Amira asks students thoughtful questions about passages they've read, focusing on skills aligned with educational and state standards.
- **Content analysis**: Claude analyzes texts to match specific comprehension skills with appropriate passages. For example, it might select a story with a vivid and rich setting to exercise the skill of explaining the influence of the setting on the plot.
- **Creating instructional content**: Claude generates questions, hints, and response pathways that maintain pedagogical rigor while ensuring an individualized learning experience.

“We use a closed-loop system where Amira selects from a curated set of dozens of possible responses after each student turn,” Liu explained. “These responses are pre-generated and carefully reviewed offline using Claude. This design enables dynamic and engaging interactions while maintaining strict control over educational quality and safety. Importantly, Amira never does public LLM inference during student sessions. We are fully FERPA-compliant and committed to protecting student data—we do not send identifiable information to any external machine learning services.”

## Transforming reading education with AI-powered conversations

Claude has strengthened Amira’s ability to develop students’ comprehension skills through responsive, research-based instruction. Teachers have shared enthusiastic feedback about how effectively Amira engages with students and adapts to their needs in real time. Liu noted, "Teachers are amazed that Amira can understand and respond to their students appropriately. It makes students feel heard and provides excellent modeling of responses."

Multiple independent research studies demonstrate that Amira drives far greater reading growth than other leading reading technologies. Students reading with Amira experience 70% faster reading growth and a minimum of 7+ extra weeks of growth in one school year.

For students, these AI-powered dialogues provide scaffolding where they need improvement, helping them build understanding of specific passages while developing broader comprehension skills.

## Building the future of AI in education

Liu envisions AI supporting educators rather than replacing human teaching, noting "We need to work closely with teachers, administrators, and literacy coaches – the people who are closest to the students. AI should assist teachers, and teachers’ needs should drive the use cases of AI."

Amira plans to continue enhancing their technology with Claude's capabilities, particularly by training the LLM to exercise more Science of Reading expertise. Liu shared, "Developing a Claude model with deep science of reading expertise would be transformative," noting this could significantly enhance multiple aspects of the product.

By combining the science of reading with the power of AI, Amira and Claude are equalizing access to effective literacy instruction and opening doors for millions of young students. In a world where literacy is fundamental to success, this collaboration embodies the promise of educational equity through the thoughtful application of AI.

## customer-story-apollo-claude.md

# Apollo accelerates outbound sales at scale with Claude


[Try Claude](https://claude.ai)


[Contact sales](/contact-sales)


Industry:

Software

Company size:

Small

Product:

Claude Platform

Partner:

Location:

North America

35% boost

in meeting bookings with Claude messaging

5M+ messaging

actions per month

Read more

[Read more](#)

Read more


Video caption


Read more

[Read more](#)

Read more


Video caption


[Prev](#)

Prev


Apollo helps thousands of sales teams convert prospects more effectively by combining AI-powered personalization with an end-to-end sales engagement platform.

## **With Claude, Apollo has enabled:**

- 35% boost in meeting bookings when leveraging Claude-powered messaging
- 15% increase in customer retention rates
- 5M+ Claude-powered messaging actions per month
- 76% preference rate for Claude-powered messages in blind testing
- 80% reduction in email writing time for sales reps at FLO EV Charging
- 40% decrease in prospecting time for account executives at Qualytics

## Transforming traditional sales outreach

Sales engagement platforms have long helped companies find, engage, and convert prospects. However, scaling personalization without sacrificing quality remains elusive. Apollo faced this challenge head-on, supporting thousands of customers from startups to enterprise teams needing genuine and relevant outreach, not generic and impersonal.

With the emergence of large language models, Apollo recognized an opportunity to transform how sales teams communicate. Tyler Phillips, AI Product Lead at Apollo, explained, "When LLMs came on the scene, it unlocked three things for us: Improving the underlying data layer for better lead discovery, enabling smarter prospect research, and fundamentally enhancing the quality of sales messaging.”

Early experiments with other AI models fell short. Competing LLM providers offered AI capabilities, but Phillips noted that "the technology can be very powerful, but it's not very accessible." For Apollo's user base, who "don't want to spend all day thinking about outbound," the writing quality of initial AI implementations wasn't there.

## Testing reveals Claude as the superior writing model

Apollo's path to Claude started with a systematic evaluation. Phillips, who personally chose Claude for his own writing, designed a rigorous test to identify the best model for their platform.

"We conducted a blind test, evaluating models across four metrics: accuracy, clarity, relevance, and tone," Phillips said. Despite initial concerns about costs due to their high messaging volume, the results were decisive.

Claude 3.5 Haiku emerged as the clear winner, achieving a 76% preference rate among Apollo users—significantly outperforming competitors. "Haiku had the highest preference rate by far," Phillips explained. The impact wasn't just theoretical. "When we deployed it in production, we saw a drastic retention spike, from 20% to 23%, solely driven by the model change."

## Building intelligent sales workflows powered by Claude

Apollo's integration of Claude goes beyond simple message generation. The implementation weaves multiple data sources together, creating personalized outbound messages that resonate with prospects.

Claude powers several critical components:

- **AI Copywriter Model**: Claude 3.5 Haiku generates all AI-driven outbound messages, from personalized emails to follow-up sequences. When users click to create a message, Claude crafts compelling copy tailored to each prospect's industry, role, and interests.
- **Signal Aggregation**: Claude combines data from Apollo's database with external signals like recent news, company events, and hiring patterns. This creates messages referencing timely, relevant information about each prospect.
- **Voice and Tone Matching**: Claude learns each salesperson's unique writing style and adapts all generated content to match their authentic voice and preferred tone by analyzing samples of users' past successful emails.
- **Messaging Templates**: All of Apollo's pre-built sales templates use Claude for dynamic content generation. Whether using a cold outreach template or a re-engagement sequence, Claude ensures each message feels personalized rather than templated.

"We use external tools to pull signals and our internal data, then Claude aggregates them to generate messages in your tone and voice, relevant to the target persona," Phillips said. "It functions as our intelligent aggregation model."

## Driving measurable impact for sales teams

Claude's AI messaging directly impacts Apollo's performance metrics. Apollo customers using Claude-powered AI messaging book more meetings than those who don't.

"Sales reps using Claude power-up messaging book 1.35x more meetings than reps using traditional email methods," Phillips reported.

Sales representatives report significant efficiency gains across the board. Dan Vovan at FLO EV Charging found "Apollo's email creation tool cut my writing time by 80%." Conner Eagleton at Qualytics saw similar results: "Apollo's AI prospecting tools cut my prospecting time by almost 40%."

The impact extends beyond efficiency. Jesse D'Agostino from Growth Marketing Firm captured the broader benefit: "Apollo.io's AI Copywriter tool has saved me countless hours by actually writing emails that get responses. My engagement rates jumped about 20% with key accounts since implementing these tools."

## Envisioning an AI-enhanced sales future

The future Apollo envisions keeps humans at the center. "I believe in human plus AI versus replacing humans," Phillips said. "We're creating a cohesive end-to-end experience where Claude acts as your teammate."

The company is pushing beyond simple automation toward genuine assistance. Their next frontier involves building an agentic system that can execute actions through Apollo's APIs, answer product questions, and guide users through complex workflows.

While others race toward automation, Apollo doubles down on augmentation—making sales professionals more effective without replacing the human insight that drives successful selling. With Claude, they're bringing sophisticated writing capabilities to tens of thousands of sales professionals who need to scale personalized communication without losing the personal touch.

## customer-story-appfolio-claude.md

# AppFolio streamlines property management communication with Claude in Amazon Bedrock


[Try Claude](https://claude.ai)


[Contact sales](/contact-sales)


Industry:

Software

Company size:

Medium

Product:

Claude Platform

Partner:

AWS

Location:

North America

3x adoption

rates due to Claude 3 Haiku's faster response times

11 hours weekly

saved by property managers on communications

Read more

[Read more](#)

Read more


Video caption


Read more

[Read more](#)

Read more


Video caption


[Prev](#)

Prev


AppFolio, a technology leader powering the future of the real estate industry, uses Claude in Amazon Bedrock for AI-assisted responses and task automation across Realm-X, the embedded generative AI solution within its platform. This helps its property management customers save time on routine communication while maintaining secure and professional service for the over eight million residents they serve.

With Claude, AppFolio was able to:

- 3x adoption rates due to Claude 3 Haiku's faster response times
- Help property managers save an average of 11 hours weekly on communications
- Process over half a million AI-suggested responses
- Reduce message response time by an average of 26 seconds

## Meeting the unique challenges of modern property management

Property management teams face a complex web of daily communications, from urgent maintenance requests to sensitive policy discussions. A single interaction might require checking lease terms, verifying maintenance history, and coordinating with multiple vendors—all while maintaining a professional tone. According to Teddy Ho, Principal Product Manager at AppFolio, property managers spend up to half their workday on communications with residents, owners, and vendors.

Managing these communications requires more than just quick responses. Property managers must maintain detailed records of every interaction, understand complex residential histories, and make quick decisions about maintenance dispatch. A simple maintenance request might require checking for duplicate tickets, reviewing maintenance history, and coordinating vendor schedules—ensuring clear, professional communication with the resident. With thousands of these interactions happening monthly, property managers needed a way to maintain quality while scaling their response capabilities.

## AppFolio's journey to AI-powered property management

AppFolio's adoption of Claude builds on years of AI investment and innovation. "We've been investing in AI for over five years now, starting with traditional ML," said Christfried Focke, Chief Scientist. "About three years ago, we started investing in a platform approach to democratize AI across all our product development teams."

This platform-first strategy proved crucial when generative AI emerged. By centralizing critical functions like ML ops, security, and data governance, AppFolio created a foundation that any team could leverage safely. "It's made it less onerous on our developers who may not be ML experts," explained Focke. "They can now implement AI in a safe and sustainable way, which has really accelerated our impact to customers."

To further enhance their AI capabilities, AppFolio chose to implement [Claude through Amazon Bedrock](https://aws.amazon.com/bedrock/claude/). "The security part is very important, as well as being able to test models quickly," said Focke. "Amazon Bedrock lets us test new models the day they're released. It's become an essential part of our development process." This centralized infrastructure, combined with Amazon Bedrock's broad set of capabilities, allows AppFolio to rapidly test and deploy new AI features while maintaining enterprise-grade security and compliance. enables AppFolio to quickly adopt new Claude models while maintaining strict data protection standards.

## Why AppFolio chose Claude in Amazon Bedrock for intelligent, secure communication

Early in their gen AI journey, AppFolio saw adoption drop off due to slow response times with their initial solution. When testing showed response latency was impacting user engagement, they turned to Claude 3 Haiku. “When Haiku came out, that actually was a big time saving, paired with some changes on our infrastructure, we really made a big revamp in the experience particularly when it comes to latency. We almost tripled our adoption,” said Ho. The team also found Claude 3.5 Sonnet's ability to process nuanced context proved essential for more complex property management needs. “We're seeing a much higher acceptance rate with Sonnet because the model can be more informed and make more intelligent responses.”

This combination of speed, intelligence, and security through Amazon Bedrock's robust infrastructure enables AppFolio to quickly adopt new Claude models while maintaining strict data protection standards.

## How Claude powers intelligent property management

AppFolio's Realm-X Messages platform leverages two Claude models for different communication needs:

- Claude 3 Haiku handles high-volume, rapid-response scenarios where speed is critical for most general inquiries
- Claude 3.5 Sonnet manages complex communications by:
  - Incorporating resident history and current situation
  - Checking for existing maintenance tickets where applicable
  - Incorporating property-specific policies and amenity information

## Transforming property management efficiency and professionalism

The impact on property management teams has been transformative. Beta customers (property managers) report saving about 11 hours per week on communications alone, with the system saving an average of 26 seconds per message while ensuring appropriate tone and context.

Beyond time savings, Claude helps property managers handle complex resident interactions with confidence. Ho said, "Not everyone's a great writer. Users say this actually helps them navigate challenging situations, especially when answering the same question for the twentieth time in a day and need to maintain composure."

Property managers are using their reclaimed time to focus on higher-value activities. Ho said, "We've seen the full range of benefits. From teams getting more important tasks done to employees having better work-life balance."

## Building the future of AI-enhanced property management

AI's impact on property management is transformative, but AppFolio sees this as just the beginning. Through their partnership with Anthropic and Amazon Web Services, they're pushing beyond simple automation to fundamentally reimagine how property managers work. Their vision is a future where AI partnerships enable every property manager to focus on what matters most—building stronger communities while delivering exceptional service at scale.

## customer-story-armanino-claude.md

# Armanino builds AI-powered accounting tools with Claude


[Try Claude](https://claude.ai)


[Contact sales](/contact-sales)


Industry:

Professional services

Company size:

Small

Product:

Claude Platform

Partner:

Location:

North America

65% reduction

in time spent on manual writing tasks

2 weeks

from idea to production for new AI-powered tools

Read more

[Read more](#)

Read more


Video caption


Read more

[Read more](#)

Read more


Video caption


[Prev](#)

Prev


Armanino, one of the largest accounting firms in the United States, uses Claude on Amazon Bedrock to transform its accounting and consulting services with AI. By integrating AI into its workflows, Armanino is significantly reducing manual tasks, improving client communication, and accelerating innovation across its audit, tax, and consulting practices. These improvements have allowed Armanino to deliver faster and spend more time on high valued items that benefit their clients. Some of these benefits include estimated time savings in audits such as:

- 65% reduction in time spent on manual writing tasks
- 60% decrease in follow-up clarifications needed
- 2 weeks from idea to production for new AI-powered tools

## Revolutionizing accounting with AI

Armanino helps organizations solve their most complex audit, tax, and consulting challenges. Traditionally in the industry, these services have been highly manual, often leaving clients with limited visibility into the process. AJ Yawn, Partner in Charge for Product and Innovation at Armanino, is spearheading an initiative to change this paradigm.

"We want to lead the industry on adopting AI for critical accounting workflows," shares AJ. His team of software engineers is building a platform that will put AI capabilities at the fingertips of everyone at the firm, from auditors to consultants.

## Rapid innovation with Claude and Amazon Bedrock

To support its ambitious AI goals, Armanino chose Claude on Amazon Bedrock. The firm had already built its modern server-less architecture on AWS, making Bedrock a natural fit for deploying AI applications.

"Claude immediately stood out when we were looking at all of the models available on Bedrock," AJ explains. "The models in the Claude 3 model family felt like the first AI models that allow you to communicate like a human."

Maliq Lawrence, Product Manager at Armanino, led a formal evaluation of the models available on Bedrock. "Many of the other LLMs we’ve evaluated produce responses that are too robotic for our use cases—and would not meet our expectations for using in customer-facing workflows," Maliq notes. "Claude is different, it provides a really personalized feel."

The product and engineering team found Claude easy to use, allowing them to quickly build, test, and deploy new capabilities. Their first AI-powered product, a tool for auditors to request documents from clients, took just two weeks to go from idea to live production.

"It's insane how easy it is to power very complex use cases with Claude," AJ adds.

## Streamlining audits and improving client communication

Armanino's new AI-powered request tool streamlines a process that historically consumed significant time and caused stress for both auditors and clients.

Previously, when clients sent incorrect documents, auditors had to manually write rejection emails, often requiring senior auditor review. This process took 10-15 minutes per rejected item, with 50-75 items typically rejected per audit. Multiplied across thousands of audits each year, this represented a substantial time sink and source of frustration.

The new tool leverages Claude to automatically generate formal notes explaining why a document is incorrect and providing detailed guidance for clients. "We needed this Claude-powered experience to act like a seasoned auditor," AJ explains.

"We're able to provide Claude a small prompt and it gives us a really nice personalized text, about three to four sentences, that delivers exactly what we need from the client in order to fulfill this request," Maliq adds.

## Significant time savings and improved confidence

Even with their first Claude-powered use case, the team was able to generate substantial value across the organization, the expected benefits are:

- 65% reduction in time spent writing rejection notes
- 60% decrease in the need for follow-up clarifications
- Thousands of hours saved across the firm annually
- 90% of users report feeling more confident when using the AI-assisted feature

“When we demoed our Claude-powered document request explainer, you could see the users’ eyes immediately light up,” AJ recalls. “We received glowing feedback. We were even told that the feature would change our users’ lives.”

## Looking to the future

Armanino's AI lab is already at work on new features to support testing and documentation workflows. "This is really just the start for us," says AJ.

With its innovative use of Claude and focus on solving real-world problems for both staff and clients, Armanino is well-positioned to lead the accounting industry into the AI-powered future.

> We evaluated every foundation model available on Amazon Bedrock. Claude is the consistent top-performer. It hallucinates a lot less, and the quality of the output is significantly better than any other model we’ve evaluated. It’s simply night and day.

— AJ Yawn, Partner in Charge, Product & Innovation, Armanino LLP


Video caption

## customer-story-asana-claude.md

# Asana supercharges work management with Claude


[Try Claude](https://claude.ai)


[Contact sales](/contact-sales)


Industry:

Software

Company size:

Medium

Product:

Claude Platform

Partner:

Location:

North America

Years to weeks

engineering development cycles with Claude

10x faster insights

data-driven decision making with Asana AI

Read more

[Read more](#)

Read more


Video caption


Read more

[Read more](#)

Read more


Video caption


[Prev](#)

Prev


Asana, a leading enterprise work management platform, powers their Asana AI offering with Claude for its 150,000+ global customers. Their innovation continues to prove that AI is no longer just a tool, it’s a teammate that can advise teams on where to focus, action work and workflows, and adapt to how an organization works.

With Asana AI, customers can:

- Get AI-driven insights across teams and tools to focus on the work that matters most
- Automate tasks and orchestrate complex workflows at scale with AI
- Use AI that adjusts to their company’s changing needs and goals

## Improving work management with AI

In a world of disconnected teams and tools, Asana found the biggest challenge for teams was coordination of work, and answering questions like who is doing what by when, and why. With Asana, teams can connect the goals set at the top of their organization, to the strategic portfolios put in place to achieve them, all the way to the cross-functional projects and individual tasks that will support those strategies. This fuels their mission to help humanity thrive by enabling the world’s teams to work together effortlessly.

Building on this foundation, Asana saw an opportunity to further revolutionize work management through generative AI. In choosing an LLM, Asana needed a provider that shared their commitment to ethics, transparency, and trust while delivering cutting-edge technology.

Bringing Asana’s Work Graph and Claude together, Asana found an ideal partner in Anthropic, whose commitment to ethical AI development aligned perfectly with their vision. "Asana and Anthropic have pursued the same goals since the beginning," says Paige Costello, Head of Product for AI at Asana.

Asana integrated Claude into their proprietary Work Graph® data model through collaboration in Anthropic's Early Access Programs. The Asana Work Graph is a unique data model that captures work-related relationships, context, and information across an entire organization. This provides the necessary structure that allows AI to access the context needed to surface reliable, accurate insights.

Eric Pelz, Head of Technology for AI at Asana, emphasizes the importance of integrating AI into existing workflows, saying, "The most effective way to adopt AI across your team is in the context of your existing work and processes. Rather than redefining how you work from first principles, you can build on top of how you already collaborate, utilizing AI to remove bottlenecks, add helpful insights, or even preemptively escalate to get support."

By combining Claude's capabilities with the Work Graph's understanding of organizational relationships and processes, Asana creates an intuitive platform that enhances team collaboration.

## Integrating Claude's capabilities into Asana's core features

Asana AI leverages Claude for several key features, including:

- **Smart workflows built with AI Studio:** Build workflows with AI agents to pass off your team’s busy work
- **Smart goals:** Draft more effective goals and standardize them across your entire organization
- **Smart chat**: Surface insights and recommendations across work and tools to action work faster
- **Smart status:** Automatically draft status updates that identify risks, roadblocks, and open questions across projects, portfolios, and goals
- **Smart summaries:** Keep up with tasks, projects, or portfolios, and gain proactive insights to stay updated on your most important initiatives

AI features are integrated into Asana's interface, making it easy for users to leverage Claude without disrupting their workflows.

## Empowering 150,000+ companies with AI-driven productivity

Asana cultivates customer relationships as strategic partnerships, collaboratively shaping products that not only achieve Asana's objectives but also lay the foundation for mutual long-term success.

This approach extends to their AI implementation, where they're running beta programs to explore custom workflows, proactive insights, and process improvements.

Claude's capabilities within Asana AI keep teams aligned and accountable through smart features like automated status updates, intelligent summaries, and personalized insights. This enables leaders to make data-driven decisions faster and adapt to changing circumstances more effectively.

The impact of these AI innovations is evident across Asana's customer base. Thanks to their rapid pace of innovation, they’ve been able to deliver AI to many of their customers over the past year. One global media and entertainment company turned to Asana to streamline their workflows for roadmapping and planning projects. Thanks to Asana they’ve improved C-Suite escalations, smoothed work handoffs, and automated request routing to the right projects and processes.

Another customer, a leading outdoor advertising company, is exploring AI to transform their creative request process. With Asana AI they are able to triage requests, deliver tailored recommendations on ad designs, and streamline their ad creation process. This means more time for their teams to focus on what matters – being creative.

## How AI impacts Asana’s business

Asana has achieved remarkable results for users by integrating Claude. AI features have increased goal clarity and productivity, and have helped reduce decision-making time for executives.

With Claude handling routine tasks and surfacing critical insights, users can focus on strategic work that drives their organizations forward. Asana is supporting a future of work where teams can maximize their creative and strategic potential by delegating tedious parts of their workflow to AI.

## Future innovation with Anthropic

Asana's partnership with Anthropic has accelerated their AI capabilities. Pelz shares, "What's cool about AI now is doing things we thought would require years of engineering effort, in just a few weeks with a small team; it's catalyzed how fast we can build features to help our customers."

Asana is committed to pushing the boundaries of AI-powered work management. Costello says, "We've always had an ambitious destination, and knew the technology and tools would evolve along the way."

By collaborating with Anthropic and leveraging Claude, Asana aims to redefine productivity and make teamwork effortless in the age of AI.

## customer-story-asapp-claude.md

# ASAPP brings human-level AI to customer service with Claude


[Try Claude](https://claude.ai)


[Contact sales](/contact-sales)


Industry:

Software

Company size:

Small

Product:

Claude Platform

Partner:

Location:

North America

25-40% improvement

in core business metrics vs other AI models

61 languages

supported without additional training

Read more

[Read more](#)

Read more


Video caption


Read more

[Read more](#)

Read more


Video caption


[Prev](#)

Prev


ASAPP leverages Claude to power AI-driven customer service solutions—enabling businesses to deliver efficient, personalized help that enhances the customer support experience.

With Claude, ASAPP:

- Saw a 25-40% improvement in core business metrics compared to other AI models
- Eliminated the need for sensitive data redaction pipeline by using Claude in Amazon Bedrock
- Enabled more natural interactions in automated customer service
- Improved customer satisfaction through contextual conversations

## Meeting growing customer service demands securely

ASAPP has worked to transform contact centers using AI for over a decade. ASAPP's journey to Claude followed limitations with their initial foundational AI provider. Using this provider's models required implementing complex processes to identify and remove sensitive information before sending requests over the public internet—then reinserting that information into responses.

"This redaction process introduced errors that impacted the quality of our AI interactions," explained Michael Griffiths, Senior Director, Data Science at ASAPP. "The modified text made it harder for the AI to reason correctly and generate appropriate responses." This challenge was particularly acute in customer service, where accurate handling of personal information is crucial.

## Choosing Claude for security and reliability

The search for a more secure solution led ASAPP to Claude in Amazon Bedrock. Nirmal Mukhi, VP of AI Engineering at ASAPP, said, "A key advantage of accessing Claude in Amazon Bedrock is the enhanced security. Our requests never traverse the public internet and are encrypted end-to-end. We can handle sensitive customer data without compromise, which is essential for our enterprise clients."

Claude's alignment capabilities also emerged as a crucial differentiator. Gabe Maggiotti, Director of Machine Learning Engineering at ASAPP, said, "We have experienced that Anthropic has better alignment." Where other AI models might ignore instructions or make problematic assumptions, Claude adheres to defined parameters.

Alignment matters because ASAPP allows companies to instruct GenerativeAgent on how to help solve customer problems. Claude makes that task easier by obediently following instructions from business users and engaging customers naturally with clarifying questions when GenerativeAgent needs more information.

## Delivering measurable business impact

The switch to Claude in Amazon Bedrock has significantly improved ASAPP's GenerativeAgent. Compared to other AI models, Claude delivers a 25-40% boost in key business outcomes in production, varying by use case.

For businesses using ASAPP's platform, the impact extends beyond metrics. ASAPP can assure their enterprise customers that sensitive information remains protected by leveraging AWS PrivateLink for private API access and benefiting from Amazon Bedrock's no-data-retention policy. "We can pass these guarantees on to our customers, making them more comfortable with us as a provider," said Mukhi.

## Transforming the customer experience

The experience represents a fundamental shift in automated service for end customers. Mukhi noted, "As humans, we're used to speaking with automated systems in certain ways. We expect a very rigid, menu-driven system." However, ASAPP's GenerativeAgent solution, powered by Claude, changes this paradigm entirely.

Customers quickly transition from terse, command-like interactions to full, natural conversations within just a few exchanges. The platform maintains context throughout conversations, meaning customers don't have to repeat information. The interaction quality is so convincing that customers often ask mid-conversation if they're speaking with a real person, and saying "thank you" to GenerativeAgent at the end.

## The future of AI-powered customer service

While technology advances rapidly, ASAPP recognizes that organizational adoption takes time, creating a business process transformation involving millions of people requires careful, thoughtful implementation. "Claude fundamentally changes what's possible in automated customer care," explains Griffiths. "The ability to have nuanced, context-aware conversations through secure enterprise channels opens up entirely new possibilities for how companies and customers interact."

Through their partnership with Anthropic, ASAPP isn't just automating interactions, but entirely reimagining them. Their vision is a future where customer service roles evolve to focus on higher-leverage, uniquely human skills while AI handles routine conversations with unprecedented efficiency and humanity. As each natural, trust-building interaction demonstrates, they're not just transforming technology—they're transforming how millions of people experience customer service.


Video caption

## customer-story-assembled-claude.md

# Assembled transforms support operations with Claude


[Try Claude](https://claude.ai)


[Contact sales](/contact-sales)


Industry:

Software

Company size:

Small

Product:

Claude Platform

Partner:

Location:

North America

20% increase

in customer satisfaction while decreasing support spend

50% reduction

in escalations

Read more

[Read more](#)

Read more


Video caption


Read more

[Read more](#)

Read more


Video caption


[Prev](#)

Prev


Assembled relies on Claude for Assist, their omnichannel AI agent and copilot. Their holistic support operations platform enables industry leaders like Brooks, Warner Brothers, Robinhood, and Stripe to deliver great support at scale, coordinating humans in partnership with AI agents.

With Claude, Assembled Assist:

- Increased customer satisfaction by 20% while decreasing support spend
- Achieved over 50% reduction in escalations
- Improved cases solved per hour by more than 30%
- Automated over 50% of cases while maintaining 90%+ customer satisfaction
- Switched to Claude in 20 minutes during a critical outage

## Meeting modern support challenges with AI

Modern support teams face a challenge: how to deliver personalized, high-quality service at massive scale. The founders of Assembled encountered this challenge firsthand while building support systems at Stripe. "In the early days of Stripe, Patrick & John \[Collison\] would have people over to their apartment to do support tickets on rotation," said John Wang, co-founder at Assembled. "There's this perception that support is a cost center—yet every great company starts with this type of customer obsession. We've found over the years that it's a uniquely difficult problem to scale great support, as a business succeeds and gets more complex."

Assembled recognized that truly effective support requires thoughtful coordination between AI and human agents, while many competitors focus solely on automation and deflection. Wang notes, "A lot of new players are oversimplifying the support problem. They throw AI agents in the mix and think that will solve everything. We deeply understand the inner workings of customer support. Instead of deflecting low value, low complexity work, we've focused on building systems to better resolve so-called Tier 2+ complexity issues—issues that require analysis, actions, and empathy. Some of these issues can be automated end-to-end, and others involve giving human agents AI superpowers. Whatever it takes to result in a great customer experience.” Assembled’s deep understanding of support operations led them to build a product that goes beyond simple automation. Instead of replacing human agents, Assembled Assist coordinates AI and human efforts to deliver better customer experiences while reducing costs and complexity.

## Why Assembled chose Claude

Assembled selected Claude for its superior reasoning, reliability, and natural conversational tone. These qualities were tested during a critical competitor outage, when Assembled needed to quickly switch their platform to maintain service for their enterprise customers. "We moved all LLM workflows over to Claude in real time, which was huge for us because we could ride out a five to six hour outage without disrupting our customers," said Wang. "Claude performed so well that we're reevaluating our entire model infrastructure. The reasoning capabilities are significantly better, and the conversational tone feels much more natural even out of the box."

Assembled discovered Claude's value for internal operations beyond customer support applications. Wang said, "When we were using Claude internally, we used it extensively to help train our sales team on our product. Early on, our sales team was using the Claude Slack bot to answer product questions during sales calls. This was so effective that we now offer all employees a monthly LLM budget—they can choose any AI model, but many prefer Claude for its natural, empathetic interactions."

The team leveraged a sophisticated evaluation system to measure AI model performance. Every support agent response goes through the evaluation system, creating a golden dataset for comparison. When agents modify AI-generated responses, the system analyzes these changes to continuously improve accuracy. This approach helped achieve dramatic improvements—for one major customer, accuracy jumped from 62% to 90% across hundreds of categories.

## How Claude powers intelligent support operations

Assembled Assist uses Claude to enhance support through:

- Dynamic ticket categorization using meta-prompting that adapts to each customer's unique taxonomy
- Intelligent routing between AI and human agents based on case complexity and customer sentiment
- Multi-model architecture enabling seamless failover during outages
- Real-time response generation and enhancement
- Secure failover architecture for enterprise reliability

## Transforming support for leading brands

Assembled's impact goes beyond automation metrics—they're fundamentally changing how support teams operate. Wang said, "Even the leading AI companies still use human agents for their own support. The key insight isn't replacing humans, but transforming how they work. We're focused on identifying which tasks AI should handle, how to escalate effectively, and where human expertise adds the most value."

Their approach has gained traction with industry leaders. For these companies, maintaining high-quality support while scaling globally isn't just about efficiency—it's crucial for brand reputation and customer loyalty.

- **A leading consumer software company**: In just the first two weeks of using Assembled Assist, they saw material improvement in both average handle time per case and CSAT. They plan on automating at least 25% of all support tickets as part of a company-wide growth push.
- **Thrasio**: Automates over 50% of support tickets with Assembled Assist, which led to nearly \$2m in cost savings and a 50% decrease in full resolution time.
- **Honeylove**: Saw massive productivity and efficiency benefits after just 5 months using Assembled Assist – solves per hour increased by 54%, escalations decreased by 20%, and CSAT for AI-powered responses increased by 18%.

## Building the future of AI-enhanced support

Assembled is developing features to help companies deploy the right resource at the right time, using Claude 3.5 Sonnet for complex reasoning tasks and Claude 3 Haiku for high-speed operations. Their platform analyzes the skills required for different types of issues and automatically routes cases to the optimal handler—whether that's an AI agent or a human with specific expertise.

Wang concludes, "We're not just playing a deflection game, because support is more complicated than that. It’s also time-consuming and expensive work, especially at a global scale. We're building something that actually powers better, faster work for support teams and their customers; for example, we’re working on leveraging LLMs to take language barriers out of the global support delivery. Through their work with Anthropic, Assembled aims to make this vision a reality—transforming customer support from a cost center into a strategic advantage that builds stronger relationships between companies and their customers.


Video caption
